name: Vigeland Park

seo.title: Vigeland Park
seo.description: A large sculpture landscape inside Frogner Park, known for Gustav Vigeland's human figures and monumental axis.

heroText: A large sculpture landscape inside Frogner Park, known for Gustav Vigeland's human figures and monumental axis.
whyText: It gives Oslo's page a strong cultural anchor beyond the waterfront and helps connect city life with green space.
